question: Why the value of atomic radius decreases from left to right in the periodic table?
option1: Constant number of shells increases the effective nuclear charge
option2: Constant number of shells decreases the effective nuclear charge
option3: Decreasing the number of shells increases the effective nuclear charge
option4: Increasing the number of shells decreases the effective nuclear charge
remarks: Correct answer is "Constant number of shells increases the effective nuclear charge"

option2: Constant number of shells decreases the effective nuclear charge
option3: Decreasing the number of shells increases the effective nuclear charge
option4: Increasing the number of shells decreases the effective nuclear charge
remarks: Correct answer is "Increasing the number of shells decreases the effective nuclear charge"
